title: Excalibur | Backpacks For Dummies support
description: This resource pack redraws the Backpacks For Dummies mod in the Excalibur style
body:
This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Backpacks For Dummies](https://modrinth.com/mod/backpacks-for-dummies) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Credits:**

*   Maffhew – Creator of Excalibur
*   Spydnel - Creator of Backpacks For Dummies
